# Deploy Current Main

Purpose: create a controlled repository event after the hardened GitHub Pages workflow became authoritative on `main`.

The deployment workflow checks out current `main`, not pull-request content, and publishes deployed-SHA evidence. This marker changes no website content, catalog value, price, Owner Portal, Business Office, North Star installation, DNS, billing, or external action.

Final tested trigger: the protected Pages workflow listens to successful `Highway 38 Solutions Tests` completion and deploys verified current `main`.
